name: HipChat API
description: HipChat REST API v2 by Atlassian. HipChat was a team messaging and collaboration platform. The service was deprecated and shut down on February 15, 2019, with Atlassian recommending migration to Slack. This spec is reconstructed from archived documentation and open-source client libraries.
